log: REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:12+3=15 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. Resists.
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:11+-2=9 vs DC 15] FAIL!
→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 15] FAIL!
REASONING: Throwing rock at Kalashtar — Armored Tank (distant).
--- Kalashtar — Armored Tank --- HP: 59/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).
ACTION: Cast Vicious Mockery (Level 0). DC 15 WIS save on Frost Giant.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:20+3=23 vs DC 15] SUCCESS. No effect.
REASONING: Throwing rock at Kalashtar — Armored Tank (distant).
→ Rock: [d20:13+9=22 vs AC 20] HIT! 20 damage. Kalashtar — Armored Tank HP: 39/59
--- Kalashtar — Armored Tank --- HP: 39/59 | AC: 20 | Conc: Hypnotic Pattern
REASONING: Concentrating on Hypnotic Pattern. Vicious Mockery on Frost Giant (disadvantage protects concentration).

REASONING: HP CRITICAL (12/59). Going invisible for survival.
ACTION: Cast Greater Invisibility (Level 4 slot, 1 remaining).
→ Kalashtar — Armored Tank is affected by Greater Invisibility.

REASONING: ROUND 1: 3 enemies. Opening with Hypnotic Pattern.
ACTION: Cast Hypnotic Pattern (Level 3 slot, 2 remaining). DC 15 WIS save. 30ft cube.
→ Frost Giant: WIS save [d20:5+3=8 vs DC 15] FAIL!

→ Ogre: WIS save [d20:8+-2=6 vs DC 15] FAIL!

ACTION: Dodge. Attacks against have disadvantage.
